CustomField.label: Total Capacity
CustomField.description: Total number of citizens this session can serve, set by the Medical Officer in Charge (REQ-010/011, VS-03 screen flow). Source input for the VS_Walk_In_Reserve_Count__c / VS_Bookable_Capacity__c formula split (D-009) and the total VS-06 distributes evenly across generated slots (A-005/D-023).
